rows.description: Computat Mattr. G.ph. Rodons Rectorie a funda dic Novenbary 1725 ad eundem diem October 1726.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash as the primary candidate for this header due to significantly more accurate description. gpt-5-mini had multiple incorrect words and dates. Minor corrections made to gemini-flash's transcription: 'G_ph.' to 'G.ph.', 'Rodons_' to 'Rodons', and 'funde' to 'funda' after visual verification.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for amounts and fraction. Pounds, shillings, and pence (299, 17, 10) were agreed by both extractors. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the fraction as 0.75 ('3q') when visual inspection clearly shows 'ob' (0.5). Both extractors failed to include the 'Summa' label which precedes the total amount, but for the total *line itself*, the description is blank. gpt-5-mini also incorrectly included descriptive text from a previous line within the total line's description.
